item.title: SMARTPHONE XIAOMI REDMI 9C 6 53" FHD+ 2GB/32GB 4G DUALSIM A10.0 GRIS
item.description: En este momento está SMARTPHONE XIAOMI REDMI 9C 6 53" FHD+ 2GB/32GB 4G DUALSIM A10.0 GRIS en el siguiente enlace! 🔎: New polished look. The back features a textured design that prevents fingerprints so that the device can retain its pristine look at all times. AI Rear Triple Camera, Make memories last with the AI triple camera, capturing your favorite moments in vivid color.13MP main camera, 2MP depth sensor, LED flasher, 2MP macro camera.
